<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>모비딕 프로그램 2.0</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+KR:wght@400;500;700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap');

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  :root {
    --bg-primary: #0d0f14;
    --bg-secondary: #141720;
    --bg-panel: #1a1d26;
    --bg-card: #1e2130;
    --accent-blue: #2a82e4;
    --accent-cyan: #00c8ff;
    --accent-red: #ef5350;
    --accent-orange: #ff6b35;
    --text-primary: #e8eaf0;
    --text-secondary: #8b92a8;
    --text-muted: #4a5068;
    --border: #2a2d3e;
    --negative: #e84545;
    --highlight: #f0b429;
  }

  body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg-primary);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    height: 100vh;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  .main {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 160px 1fr 160px;
    flex: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .panel {
    background: var(--bg-panel);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .panel-title {
    padding: 6px 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent-cyan);
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  .rank-list { overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; }
  .rank-item {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #1c1f2a;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s;
  }
  .rank-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card); }
  .rank-item.active { background: #1f2540; border-left: 2px solid var(--accent-cyan); }
  .rank-name { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary); }
  .rank-pct { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }

  .center-panel {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .trade-controls {
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    padding: 6px 0;
  }

  .title-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0 0 5px 8px;
  }
  .title-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
  .logo-icon img { height: 28px; width: auto; }
  .logo-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--text-primary); }
  .logo-title span { color: var(--accent-cyan); }
  .timer-wrap {
    margin-left: auto;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent-cyan);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .timer-wrap .timer-count { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 12px; margin-left: 4px; }

  .control-row1 {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    padding-left: 8px;
  }
  .control-row2 {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    padding-left: 8px;
  }

  .btn {
    padding: 5px 6px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.15s;
    white-space: nowrap;
    margin-right: 4px;
  }
  .btn:last-child { margin-right: 0; }
  .btn:hover { filter: brightness(1.15); }
  .btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

  .btn-pct { background: #2a2d3e; color: var(--text-primary); flex: 1; text-align: center; }
  .btn-input {
    flex: 1.2;
    padding: 5px 6px;
    background: #12141c;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 3px;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    text-align: right;
    margin-right: 4px;
    min-width: 0;
  }
  .btn-buy-limit { background: #1e3a5f; color: #5ba8e8; border: 1px solid #2a5fa0; flex: 1.5; text-align: center; }
  .btn-sell-market  { background: #3d1f1f; color: var(--accent-red); border: 1px solid #6b2c2c; flex: 1.5; text-align: center; }
  .btn-sell-market2 { background: #4a1a1a; color: #ff8080; border: 1px solid #7a2a2a; flex: 1.5; text-align: center; margin-right: 0; }
  .btn-stoploss { background: var(--accent-red); color: white; flex: 1.2; text-align: center; }
  .btn-sl-neg  { background: #2a1818; color: var(--negative); border: 1px solid #5a2020; flex: 1; text-align: center; }
  .btn-sl-zero { background: #1a1a1a; color: #8b92a8; border: 1px solid #3a3d50; flex: 0.8; text-align: center; }
  .btn-sl-pos  { background: #182a18; color: #26c281; border: 1px solid #265026; flex: 1; text-align: center; }
  .btn-execute { background: #3a3d50; color: #8b92a8; flex: 1.5; text-align: center; margin-right: 0; }

  .icon-bar {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 24px;
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 6px 12px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .icon-btn {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px;
    cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); background: #12141c;
    transition: all 0.2s; user-select: none;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { border-color: #4a5068; background: #1a1d26; }
  .icon-btn .icon-img { width: 26px; height: 26px; object-fit: contain; filter: brightness(2.5) invert(1); transition: all 0.2s; }
  .icon-btn .icon-label { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-muted); transition: color 0.2s; }
  .icon-btn.active { border-color: #26c281; background: #0d2318; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(38,194,129,0.3); }
  .icon-btn.active .icon-img { filter: brightness(1) invert(0) sepia(1) hue-rotate(100deg) saturate(3); }
  .icon-btn.active .icon-label { color: #26c281; }
  .icon-btn.active-blue { border-color: #00c8ff; background: #051a24; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0,200,255,0.3); }
  .icon-btn.active-blue .icon-img { filter: brightness(1) invert(0) sepia(1) hue-rotate(180deg) saturate(5); }
  .icon-btn.active-blue .icon-label { color: #00c8ff; }
  .icon-btn.active-yellow { border-color: #f0b429; background: #1f1500; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(240,180,41,0.3); }
  .icon-btn.active-yellow .icon-img { filter: brightness(1) invert(0) sepia(1) hue-rotate(10deg) saturate(5); }
  .icon-btn.active-yellow .icon-label { color: #f0b429; }

  .chart-area { flex: 1; background: #0e1018; overflow: hidden; min-height: 0; }

  .jangchil-area {
    height: 180px; flex-shrink: 0;
    background: #0a0c10; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 16px; gap: 14px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .jangchil-area::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 18px, rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 18px, rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 19px);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .jangchil-char { flex-shrink: 0; order: 2; }
  .jangchil-char img { height: 130px; width: auto; }
  .jangchil-bubble {
    flex: 1; order: 1;
    background: #0e1a0e; border: 1px solid #2a4a2a; border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 10px 14px; position: relative; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.7; text-align: center;
  }
  .jangchil-bubble::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; right: -9px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
    border: 8px solid transparent; border-left-color: #2a4a2a; border-right: none;
  }
  .jangchil-bubble::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; right: -7px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
    border: 7px solid transparent; border-left-color: #0e1a0e; border-right: none;
  }
  .jangchil-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #f0b429; margin-bottom: 5px; letter-spacing: 1px; }
  .jangchil-title span { color: #ff4444; }
  .jangchil-msg { color: #b8e8b8; font-size: 12px; }
  .jangchil-sub { color: #6a8a6a; font-size: 11px; margin-top: 4px; }
  .jangchil-sub span { color: #f0b429; }

  .right-panel { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; border-right: none; }
  .analysis-card {
    background: #1a1020; border: 1px solid #3d1a5a; border-radius: 4px;
    margin: 8px; padding: 8px; text-align: center; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .analysis-card-title { font-size: 11px; color: #9b6dbf; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .analysis-card-status { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #cc88ff; }
  .whale-list { overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; }
  .whale-item {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 4px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1c1f2a; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s;
  }
  .whale-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card); }
  .whale-name { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-primary); }
  .whale-pct { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; color: #ff4444; }

  .footer { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; height: 56px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .footer-btn { border: none; font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 900; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.15s; }
  .footer-btn:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); }
  .footer-wait { background: var(--highlight); color: #1a1000; }
  .footer-cancel { background: var(--accent-orange); color: white; }

  .ws-status {
    display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: #ff4444; margin-left: 6px; vertical-align: middle; transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .ws-status.connected { background: #26c281; }

  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #2a2d3e; border-radius: 2px; }

  /* ── 추가: 버튼 활성화 스타일 ── */
  .btn-pct.pct-active {
    color: #26c281;
    border: 1.5px solid #26c281;
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(38,194,129,0.3);
  }
  /* 추가요청01: 매수예약 활성화 — 파란 네온 강하게 */
  .btn-buy-limit.buylimit-active {
    color: #00cfff;
    border: 2px solid #00cfff;
    box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(0,207,255,0.9), 0 0 28px rgba(0,207,255,0.5);
    background: #071a2a;
    animation: blinkBlue 0.7s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes blinkBlue {
    from { box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(0,207,255,0.9), 0 0 28px rgba(0,207,255,0.5); }
    to   { box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0,207,255,0.4), 0 0 10px rgba(0,207,255,0.2); }
  }
  /* 추가요청01: 금액 입력창 활성화 — 파란 테두리 */
  .btn-input.input-active {
    border: 1.5px solid #00cfff;
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0,207,255,0.5);
  }
  /* 추가요청03: 즉시매수 활성화 — 강렬한 빨간 네온 + 깜빡임 */
  .btn-sell-market.trade-active {
    color: #ff4400;
    border: 2px solid #ff4400;
    box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(255,68,0,0.95), 0 0 28px rgba(255,68,0,0.6);
    background: #2a0a00;
    animation: blinkBuyNow 0.6s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes blinkBuyNow {
    from { box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(255,68,0,0.95), 0 0 28px rgba(255,68,0,0.6); }
    to   { box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(255,68,0,0.4), 0 0 10px rgba(255,68,0,0.2); }
  }
  /* 추가요청03: 즉시매도 활성화 — 강렬한 주황 네온 + 깜빡임 */
  .btn-sell-market2.trade-active {
    color: #ff8800;
    border: 2px solid #ff8800;
    box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(255,136,0,0.95), 0 0 28px rgba(255,136,0,0.6);
    background: #2a1500;
    animation: blinkSellNow 0.6s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes blinkSellNow {
    from { box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(255,136,0,0.95), 0 0 28px rgba(255,136,0,0.6); }
    to   { box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(255,136,0,0.4), 0 0 10px rgba(255,136,0,0.2); }
  }
  .btn-stoploss.stoploss-active {
    border: 2px solid #ff2222;
    box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(255,34,34,0.95), 0 0 32px rgba(255,34,34,0.6), 0 0 48px rgba(255,34,34,0.3);
    color: #ff2222;
    background: #3a0808;
    animation: blinkRed 0.6s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes blinkRed {
    from { box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(255,34,34,0.95), 0 0 32px rgba(255,34,34,0.6); }
    to   { box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(255,34,34,0.4), 0 0 12px rgba(255,34,34,0.2); }
  }
  .btn-sl-neg.slip-active,
  .btn-sl-zero.slip-active,
  .btn-sl-pos.slip-active {
    color: #f0b429;
    border: 1.5px solid #f0b429;
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(240,180,41,0.3);
  }
  .btn-execute.execute-active {
    color: #00ff88;
    border: 2px solid #00ff88;
    box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(0,255,136,0.95), 0 0 32px rgba(0,255,136,0.6), 0 0 48px rgba(0,255,136,0.3);
    background: #0a2a1a;
    animation: blinkGreen 0.6s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes blinkGreen {
    from { box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(0,255,136,0.95), 0 0 32px rgba(0,255,136,0.6); }
    to   { box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(0,255,136,0.4), 0 0 12px rgba(0,255,136,0.2); }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="main">

  <div class="panel left-panel">
    <div class="panel-title">
      전일대비 TOP 20
      <span class="ws-status" id="wsStatus"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="rank-list" id="rankList">
      <div style="padding:20px 8px; color:#4a5068; font-size:11px; text-align:center;">연결 중...</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="center-panel">
    <div class="trade-controls">

      <div class="title-row">
        <div class="title-left">
          <span class="logo-icon"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="고래" /></span>
          <span class="logo-title">모비딕 프로그램 <span>2.0</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="timer-wrap">
          <span id="clock">00:00:00</span>
          <span class="timer-count">(60)</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="control-row1">
        <button class="btn btn-pct">10%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-pct">25%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-pct">50%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-pct">100%</button>
        <input class="btn-input" type="text" value="0" />
        <button class="btn btn-buy-limit">매수예약</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sell-market">즉시매수<br><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:400">(시장가)</span></button>
        <button class="btn btn-sell-market2">즉시매도<br><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:400">(시장가)</span></button>
      </div>

      <div class="control-row2">
        <button class="btn btn-stoploss">손절</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sl-neg">-0.5%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sl-neg">-1.0%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sl-neg">-1.5%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sl-zero">0%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sl-pos">+2%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sl-pos">+3%</button>
        <button class="btn btn-execute">실행</button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="icon-bar">
      <div class="icon-btn" id="iconProxy" onclick="toggleIcon(this,'active')">
        <img class="icon-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="프록시 서버" />
        <span class="icon-label">프록시 서버</span>
      </div>
      <div class="icon-btn" id="iconNetwork" onclick="toggleIcon(this,'active-blue')">
        <img class="icon-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="네트워크 통신" />
        <span class="icon-label">네트워크 통신</span>
      </div>
      <div class="icon-btn" id="iconStrategy" onclick="toggleIcon(this,'active-yellow')">
        <img class="icon-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="방어막&비상탈출" />
        <span class="icon-label">방어막&비상탈출</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="chart-area">
      <div style="height:100%;width:100%">
        <div id="tradingview_chart" style="height:100%;width:100%"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="jangchil-area">
      <div class="jangchil-bubble">
        <div class="jangchil-title">- <span>정찰병</span> 상황 보고 -</div>
        <div class="jangchil-msg">"호가창에 심각한 팬세를 포착 했습니다.<br>09:01 : 1분봉 매수 예약한 것을<br>미감전 자동 취소 하겠습니다.."</div>
        <div class="jangchil-sub">※취소시유 - 호가창 급한 <span>○○○</span>을 발견.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="jangchil-char"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="정찰병" /></div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="panel right-panel">
    <div class="analysis-card">
      <div class="analysis-card-title">비트코인 상황</div>
      <div class="analysis-card-status">분석 대기 중...</div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-title">고래 후보 TOP20</div>
    <div class="whale-list" id="whaleList"></div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="footer">
  <button class="footer-btn footer-wait">관망 (Wait)</button>
  <button class="footer-btn footer-cancel">예약 취소 (Cancel)</button>
</div>

<script type="text/javascript" src="https://s3.tradingview.com/tv.js"></script>
<script>
// ── 아이콘 토글 ──
function toggleIcon(el, activeClass) {
  const classes = ['active','active-blue','active-yellow'];
  const isOn = el.classList.contains(activeClass);
  classes.forEach(c => el.classList.remove(c));
  if (!isOn) el.classList.add(activeClass);
}

// ── 타이머 ──
let seconds = 0;
function updateClock() {
  seconds++;
  const h = String(Math.floor(seconds/3600)).padStart(2,'0');
  const m = String(Math.floor((seconds%3600)/60)).padStart(2,'0');
  const s = String(seconds%60).padStart(2,'0');
  document.getElementById('clock').textContent = h+':'+m+':'+s;
}
setInterval(updateClock, 1000);

// ── TradingView 차트 ──
let currentSymbol = 'UPBIT:BIOKRW';

function initChart(symbol) {
  currentSymbol = symbol;
  document.getElementById('tradingview_chart').innerHTML = '';
  new TradingView.widget({
    container_id: "tradingview_chart",
    autosize: true,
    symbol: symbol,
    interval: "1",
    timezone: "Asia/Seoul",
    theme: "dark",
    style: "8",
    locale: "kr",
    toolbar_bg: "#0e1018",
    enable_publishing: false,
    hide_top_toolbar: false,
    hide_legend: false,
    save_image: false,
    backgroundColor: "rgba(14, 16, 24, 1)",
    gridColor: "rgba(42, 45, 62, 0.5)",
    time_frames: [
      { text: "1분",  resolution: "1",  description: "1분봉" },
      { text: "5분",  resolution: "5",  description: "5분봉" },
      { text: "15분", resolution: "15", description: "15분봉" },
      { text: "30분", resolution: "30", description: "30분봉" },
      { text: "1시간",resolution: "60", description: "1시간봉" },
      { text: "1일",  resolution: "D",  description: "1일봉" },
    ],
    studies: [
      "MASimple@tv-basicstudies",
      "MAExp@tv-basicstudies",
      "Volume@tv-basicstudies",
      "RSI@tv-basicstudies"
    ],
  });
}
initChart(currentSymbol);

// ── 웹소켓 TOP20 ──
let allTickers = {};
let marketMap = {};
let ws = null;
const wsStatus = document.getElementById('wsStatus');
const rankListEl = document.getElementById('rankList');

async function fetchMarketList() {
  try {
    const res = await fetch('https://api.upbit.com/v1/market/all?isDetails=false');
    const data = await res.json();
    const krwMarkets = data.filter(m => m.market.startsWith('KRW-'));
    krwMarkets.forEach(m => { marketMap[m.market] = m.korean_name; });
    const codes = krwMarkets.map(m => m.market);
    connectWebSocket(codes);
  } catch(e) { setTimeout(fetchMarketList, 5000); }
}

function connectWebSocket(codes) {
  if (ws) ws.close();
  ws = new WebSocket('wss://api.upbit.com/websocket/v1');
  ws.onopen = () => {
    wsStatus.classList.add('connected');
    ws.send(JSON.stringify([{ ticket: "mobydick-top20" }, { type: "ticker", codes: codes }]));
  };
  ws.onclose = () => { wsStatus.classList.remove('connected'); setTimeout(() => connectWebSocket(codes), 3000); };
  ws.onerror = () => { wsStatus.classList.remove('connected'); };
  ws.onmessage = async (event) => {
    try {
      const text = await event.data.text();
      const d = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!d.code) return;
      allTickers[d.code] = { code: d.code, name: marketMap[d.code] || d.code.replace('KRW-',''), pct: d.signed_change_rate * 100 };
      scheduleUpdate();
    } catch(e) {}
  };
}

let updateTimer = null;
function scheduleUpdate() {
  if (updateTimer) return;
  updateTimer = setTimeout(() => { updateTimer = null; renderTop20(); }, 500);
}

function renderTop20() {
  const top20 = Object.values(allTickers).sort((a, b) => b.pct - a.pct).slice(0, 20);
  rankListEl.innerHTML = '';
  top20.forEach((item) => {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    const isActive = item.code === currentSymbol;
    div.className = 'rank-item' + (isActive ? ' active' : '');
    const pctColor = item.pct >= 0 ? '#ff4444' : '#26c281';
    const pctSign = item.pct >= 0 ? '+' : '';
    div.innerHTML = '<span class="rank-name">'+item.name+'</span><span class="rank-pct" style="color:'+pctColor+'">'+pctSign+item.pct.toFixed(2)+'%</span>';
    div.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const symbol = 'UPBIT:' + item.code.replace('KRW-','') + 'KRW';
      currentSymbol = item.code;
      initChart(symbol);
      document.querySelectorAll('.rank-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
      div.classList.add('active');
    });
    rankListEl.appendChild(div);
  });
}

// ── 고래 후보 TOP20 ──
const whaleData = [
  {name:'바이오프로토콜',pct:11.86},{name:'카타나',pct:7.14},{name:'레드스톤',pct:6.32},
  {name:'플록',pct:6.21},{name:'펫지뱅권',pct:5.74},{name:'쑨',pct:4.96},
  {name:'제로베이스',pct:4.73},{name:'엑셀라',pct:4.19},{name:'마스크네트워크',pct:3.64},
  {name:'문버드',pct:3.41},{name:'무뎀',pct:2.91},{name:'커널다오',pct:2.38},
  {name:'블라스트',pct:2.10},{name:'제로엑스',pct:1.84},{name:'카이트',pct:1.80},
  {name:'스파크',pct:1.75},{name:'저스트',pct:1.63},{name:'도지코인',pct:1.42},
  {name:'에이더블유이',pct:1.08},{name:'세이',pct:0.88}
];
const whaleList = document.getElementById('whaleList');
whaleData.forEach(item => {
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = 'whale-item';
  div.innerHTML = '<span class="whale-name">'+item.name+'</span><span class="whale-pct">'+item.pct.toFixed(2)+'%</span>';
  whaleList.appendChild(div);
});

fetchMarketList();

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// 추가: 버튼 활성화 엔진 (추가요청01·02·03)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════

function clearPct() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.btn-pct').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('pct-active'));
}
function clearBuyLimit() {
  document.querySelector('.btn-buy-limit').classList.remove('trade-active');
  document.querySelector('.btn-buy-limit').classList.remove('buylimit-active');
}
function clearTrade() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.btn-buy-limit, .btn-sell-market, .btn-sell-market2').forEach(b => {
    b.classList.remove('trade-active');
    b.classList.remove('buylimit-active');
  });
}
function clearRow2() {
  document.querySelector('.btn-stoploss').classList.remove('stoploss-active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.btn-sl-neg, .btn-sl-zero, .btn-sl-pos').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('slip-active'));
  document.querySelector('.btn-execute').classList.remove('execute-active');
}
function clearAll() { clearPct(); clearTrade(); clearRow2(); }

// 퍼센트 버튼 — 하나만 선택
document.querySelectorAll('.btn-pct').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => { clearPct(); btn.classList.add('pct-active'); });
});

// 추가요청01: 입력창 포커스/클릭 시 퍼센트만 비활성화, 매수예약 유지
document.querySelector('.btn-input').addEventListener('click', clearPct);
document.querySelector('.btn-input').addEventListener('focus', clearPct);
document.querySelector('.btn-input').addEventListener('input', clearPct);

// 추가요청01: 매수예약 클릭 시 — 매수예약 활성화 + 금액 입력창 테두리 활성화 유지
document.querySelector('.btn-buy-limit').addEventListener('click', function() {
  if (this.classList.contains('buylimit-active')) {
    this.classList.remove('buylimit-active');
    document.querySelector('.btn-input').classList.remove('input-active');
  } else {
    clearTrade();
    this.classList.add('buylimit-active');
    document.querySelector('.btn-input').classList.add('input-active');
  }
});

// 추가요청02: 즉시매수 — 활성화 시 모든 버튼 비활성화 후 자신만 활성화, 한 번 더 누르면 비활성화
document.querySelector('.btn-sell-market').addEventListener('click', function() {
  if (this.classList.contains('trade-active')) {
    this.classList.remove('trade-active');
  } else {
    clearAll();
    document.querySelector('.btn-input').classList.remove('input-active');
    this.classList.add('trade-active');
  }
});

// 추가요청02: 즉시매도 — 활성화 시 모든 버튼 비활성화 후 자신만 활성화, 한 번 더 누르면 비활성화
document.querySelector('.btn-sell-market2').addEventListener('click', function() {
  if (this.classList.contains('trade-active')) {
    this.classList.remove('trade-active');
  } else {
    clearAll();
    document.querySelector('.btn-input').classList.remove('input-active');
    this.classList.add('trade-active');
  }
});

// 손절 — 활성화/비활성화, 비활성화 시 2행 전체 비활성화
document.querySelector('.btn-stoploss').addEventListener('click', function() {
  if (this.classList.contains('stoploss-active')) { clearRow2(); }
  else { this.classList.add('stoploss-active'); }
});

// 슬리피지 — 하나만 선택
document.querySelectorAll('.btn-sl-neg, .btn-sl-zero, .btn-sl-pos').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.btn-sl-neg, .btn-sl-zero, .btn-sl-pos').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('slip-active'));
    btn.classList.add('slip-active');
  });
});

// 실행 — 활성화 후 손절 완료 시 2행 전체 비활성화
document.querySelector('.btn-execute').addEventListener('click', function() {
  if (this.classList.contains('execute-active')) { clearRow2(); }
  else {
    this.classList.add('execute-active');
    setTimeout(() => { clearRow2(); }, 2000);
  }
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
